inline_comments.message:
I guess your intention is to normalize the data model passing to _get_hpa_capxxx()
I agree with your idea, but I would suggest re-think about the way to do that, 
specifically, use array(or tuple) vs dict.  with array to passing parameters, 
the handler of hpa_xxx have to locate the specific parameter by index, which is less straigtforward.
Instead, if you could use a dict with key to pair with each parameter, e.g. {"flavor": flavor,"xxx":yyy}, it might be more straightforward for handler to access specific parameter.
